description:
Reference to evidence supporting an action or result.

Evidence can be screenshots, log files, links, or other artifacts
that provide context or proof of an action's execution.

evidence_id.description: Unique identifier for this evidence reference
evidence_id.title: Evidence Id

uri.description: URI or path to the evidence resource
uri.title: Uri

sha256.description: SHA-256 hash of the evidence content for integrity verification
sha256.title: Sha256

created_at.description: When the evidence was created or captured
created_at.title: Created At

title: EvidenceRef
